title: AutoWoodCutter
body:
Auto Wood Cutter is a Fabric‑based automation mod that automatically harvests and replants trees using simple vanilla‑friendly setups. By placing an axe in an item frame next to a chest and a small dirt platform, you can build compact farms that continuously cut logs and replant saplings without manual chopping.

Automatically detects fully grown trees above the configured dirt area
Instantly harvests logs and leaves, sending drops into nearby hoppers
Uses saplings stored in the connected chest to replant trees on the dirt blocks
Supports both single‑sapling trees and 2×2 tree layouts

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ed3575415bb2101108f9af84521bbfeb2f77cc.png)
